chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Bail Application No. S- 419 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of bail application. 17.02.2025. Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh ------------ Learned Counsel for the applicant does not press the bail application on the pretext that the parties are not in his contact, accordingly, application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
